nodes.itemHTML: • redux-logicstars1.8k - Redux middleware for organizing business logic and action side effects.
• redux-observablestars7.6k - RxJS middleware for action side effects in Redux using "Epics".
• remote-redux-devtoolsstars1.7k - Redux DevTools remotely.
• redux-observablestars7.6k - RxJS middleware for action side effects in Redux using "Epics".
• redurxstars98 - Redux'ish Functional State Management using RxJS.
• redux-rollbar-middleware - Redux middleware that wraps exceptions in actions and sends them to Rollbar with current state.
• Laravel Collection Macrosstars1.1k - A set of handy collection macros
• #inqlude - The most well-known aggregation of Qt-centric libraries out there. A package manager is also available here.
• Linux-Apps.com - Despite the name, Linux-Apps.com aggregates a wide variety of Qt-based tools and libraries for both end-users and developers.

• Stephan Binner's Ubuntu PPAs - Ubuntu users who are hesitant to install anything outside of their package managers can obtain any recent version of Qt from these repositories. Instructions for adding them are found within.
• Google Earth - The virtual globe.
• Tailorstars1.5k - Streaming layout service for front-end microservices, inspired by Facebook's BigPipe.
• Arkade London - Arkade London is a pure personal and experimental webVJ fan art.
• Scons - A software construction tool configured with a Python script.
• Premake - A tool configured with a Lua script to generate project files for Visual Studio, GNU Make, Xcode, Code::Blocks, and more across Windows, Mac OS X, and Linux.
• LightNodestars164 - Micro RPC/REST Framework built on OWIN http://neuecc.github.io/LightNode.
• WebAPIContrib for ASP.NET COREstars434 - Community Contributions for ASP.NET Core.
• go-dotnetstars383 - Go wrapper for the .NET Core Runtime.
• BundlerMinifierstars519 - Visual Studio extension that let's you configure bundling and minification of JS, CSS and HTML files.
• Stack Exchange Redisstars4.7k - High performance general purpose redis client for .NET languages (C# etc).
• Platformus - Free, open source and cross-platform CMS based on ASP.NET Core 1.0 and ExtCore framework.
• SimpleContentstars314 - Simple, yet flexible content and blog engine for ASP.NET Core that can work with or without a database.

• npgsqlstars2.3k - .NET data provider for PostgreSQL. It allows any program developed for .NET framework to access a PostgreSQL database server. It is implemented in 100% C# code. PostgreSQL versions since 9.1 are officially supported, others may work. http://www.npgsql.org
• ravendb - Linq enabled document database for .NET.
• RethinkDb.Driverstars350 - C#/.NET RethinkDB driver with 100% ReQL API coverage.
• SimplCommercestars3.2k - Super simple ecommerce system built on .NET Core.
• rider - Cross-platform C# IDE based on the IntelliJ platform and ReSharper.
• Omnisharp - Family of Open Source projects, each with one goal: To enable a great .NET experience in YOUR editor of choice.

• Visual Studio Codestars115.6k - New type of tool that combines the simplicity of a code editor with what developers need for their core edit-build-debug cycle. Code provides comprehensive editing and debugging support, an extensibility model, and lightweight integration with existing tools.
• Visual Studio Community - Free editor for individual developers, open source projects, academic research, education, and small professional teams.
• Autofacstars3.5k - Addictive .NET IoC container.
• SimpleInjectorstars983 - Easy, flexible, and fast Dependency Injection library that promotes best practice to steer developers towards the pit of success.
• dnxcore-logging-logstashstars7 - Logstash logging extension for .NET Core applications with UDP and Redis transports.
• MailKitstars4.1k - Cross-platform .NET library for IMAP, POP3, and SMTP.
• MimeKitstars1.2k - Cross-platform .NET MIME creation and parser library with support for S/MIME, PGP, DKIM, TNEF and Unix mbox spools.
• AutoMapperstars8k - Convention-based object-object mapper in .NET.
• CommonMark.NETstars969 - The implementation of CommonMark specification in C# for converting Markdown documents to HTML.
• markdigstars2.5k - Fast, powerfull, CommonMark compliant, extensible Markdown processor for .NET.
• Scrutorstars1.6k - Assembly scanning extensions for Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.

• Entity Framework Corestars10.1k - Familiar developer experience to previous versions of EF, including LINQ, POCO, and Code First support.
    • EFCore.BulkExtensionsstars1.9k - EntityFrameworkCore Bulk Batch Extensions for Insert Update Delete Read (CRUD) ops
    • EntityFramework-Plusstars1.7k - Entity Framework Utilities | Bulk Operations | Batch Delete | Batch Update | Query Cache | Query Filter | Query Future | Query Include | Audit.
    • EntityFramework.Exceptionsstars286 - Use typed Exceptions for EntityFrameworkCore when your SQL query violates database constraints in SqlServer, MySql, or PostgreSQL.
    • EntityFramework.Triggersstars328 - Trigger events for EF.
    • EntityFramework.Rxstars119 - Reactive hot observables of your EF operations.
    • Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQLstars862 - Entity Framework Core provider for PostgreSQL.
    • EntityFramework.PrimaryKeystars44 - Easily get the primary key of any entity (including composite keys).
    • EntityFramework.TypedOriginalValuesstars30 - Get a proxy object of the original values of your entity (typed access to Property("...").OriginalValue).
    • EntityFramework.VersionedPropertiesstars32 - Classes which auto-magically keep an audit history of the changes to the specified property.
    • LINQKitstars952 - A free set of extensions for LINQ to SQL and Entity Framework power users.
    • Pomelo.EntityFrameworkCore.MySqlstars1.9k - Entity Framework Core provider for MySql built on top of mysql-net/MySqlConnector.
    • spectre.querystars38 - A simple query language for Entity Framework Core.
• NReco.Datastars151 - Lightweight provider-independent DAL for SQL commands generation, CRUD operations and simple POCO mapping.
• MediatR.Extensions.Microsoft.DependencyInjectionstars210 - MediatR extensions for Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.
• MicroBusstars202 - Simple in process mediator for .NET.
• HangfireIOstars6.7k - Easy way to perform fire-and-forget, delayed and recurring tasks inside ASP.NET apps http://hangfire.io.
• SolrExpressstars66 - Simple and lightweight query .NET library for Solr, in a controlled, buildable and fail fast way.
• Newtonsoft.Jsonstars8.5k - Popular high-performance JSON framework for .NET.
• protobuf-netstars3.4k - Protocol Buffers library for idiomatic .NET.
• TinyCsvParserstars258 - Easy to use, easy to extend and high-performance library for CSV parsing with .NET.
• Bogusstars4.5k - Simple and sane fake data generator for C#. Based on and ported from the famed faker.js.
• MyTested.AspNetCore.Mvcstars1.4k - Fluent testing framework for ASP.NET Core MVC.
• Netlingstars1.2k - Load tester client for easy web testing.
• nunitstars66 - NUnit test runner for .NET Core.
• shouldlystars1.5k - Should testing for .NET - the way Asserting Should be! http://shouldly.readthedocs.org/en/latest
• TestStack.BDDfystars364 - The simplest BDD framework EVER!
• WampSharpstars358 - C# implementation of The Web Application Messaging Protocol - Protocol that provides messaging patterns of Remote Procedure Calls and Publish/Subscribe over WebSockets.

• ASP.NET Core Starter Kitstars1.1k - Opinionated boilerplate for web development based on .NET Core, Kestrel, GraphQL on the backend and Babel, Webpack, React and Redux on the frontend. This boilerplate comes in both C# and F# flavors.
• saaskitstars939 - Developer toolkit for building SaaS applications.
• CakeExcel pluginstars21 - An Excel view to generate XLSX files.
• jitwatch-intellijstars162 - JITWatch plugin for IntelliJ IDEA.
• Ian Sommerville http://iansommerville.com/systems-software-and-technology/
